mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE pool_tree AS ( SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_name ,CAST(pool_name AS CHAR(2000)) AS pool_full_name ,CAST(LPAD(COALESCE(outer_sort, 0), 10, '0') AS CHAR(2000)) AS sort_path FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT child.id ,child.parent_id ,child.pool_name ,CONCAT(parent.pool_full_name, '/', child.pool_name) AS pool_full_name ,CONCAT(parent.sort_path, '/', LPAD(COALESCE(child.inner_sort, 0), 10, '0')) AS sort_path FROM ip_investment_pool child INNER JOIN pool_tree parent ON parent.id = child.parent_id WHERE child.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_name ,pool_full_name FROM pool_tree ORDER BY sort_path ASC ,id ASC
